content: The ship-page validator must include ALL photo-honesty scans as warnings: byte-equal cross-page reuse (#1502, reads image-reuse-registry.json), perceptual near-duplicates (#1503, reads image-recrops-registry.json), and per-line image-count thresholds from admin/validator-config.json (#1504 error-below / #1505 min-warning / #1506 max-warning). Warnings, not blocks. Operator verbatim: 'include the photo scans and checks and so forth (all of them) in the validator. warnings.'
